heading: CPSC report
label: 8007 CPSC report
text: Not later than 1 year after the last day of each fiscal year for which grants are made under , the Commission shall submit to Congress a report evaluating the implementation of the grant program authorized by that section.section 8004 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2
